_model_options: resnet18 | vgg11 | alexnet | mobilenet | lenet | deit_tiny | mlp
_mix2sfl_beta_alpha_note: Beta distribution alpha for lambda sampling. 1.0 = uniform, <1.0 = bimodal, >1.0 = concentrated near 0.5
_mix2sfl_smashmix_ratio_note: Fraction of other clients to mix with per client (0.0 = no mixing, 1.0 = mix with all)
_note: Mix2SFL uses concatenated server training mode. SmashMix creates mixed activations from client pairs.
